Name: Linux File Capabilities Security Audit
Description: Enumerates all files on the filesystem with Linux capabilities set via getcap. Categorises discovered capabilities by severity (Critical: cap_setuid/cap_sys_admin/cap_sys_module; High: cap_dac_override/cap_sys_ptrace/cap_chown; Medium: cap_net_admin/cap_net_raw). Read-only enumeration - no capabilities are modified.
